hero.name: Your Name
hero.tagline: Digital Transformation Practitioner · WMS/WES System Architecture
hero.description:
Committed to empowering smart logistics and supply chain management with technology,
focusing on transforming complex business processes into efficient system solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.label: INTRODUCTION
about.p1: I am a WES implementation engineer specializing in smart logistics and automated warehousing. With a TEM-8 English background and CCP membership, I not only possess cross-cultural communication skills but also have solid practical experience in system architecture design and implementation.
about.p2: Currently, I have participated in the implementation of several ten-million-level AS/RS projects. From early requirement analysis and solution design to subsequent system development tracking, on-site commissioning, and go-live support, I have developed end-to-end closed-loop solution capabilities. I always believe that code is merely a tool, and maximizing the efficiency of every square meter of warehouse space is its true commercial value.
about.p3: In this world full of uncertainties, I am committed to building a more stable and efficient smart supply chain through digital means.

items.title: WES System Implementation Engineer
items.description: Responsible for WES system research, solution design, and delivery mapping for multiple large automated warehouse projects. Deeply engaged in business process mapping, system function planning, equipment integration, and user training.

items.title: WMS Implementation Consultant
items.description: Led requirement analysis and deployment of WMS systems, successfully delivering digital transformation projects across multiple manufacturing warehouses. Effectively increased client warehouse operating efficiency.

items.title: Bachelor · English Major
items.description: Passed TEM-8, developing outstanding cross-cultural communication and documentation skills, bridging the gap between technical understanding and international project management.
